items.title: Turn Pico W into USB Wi-Fi
items.oneliner: Flash Pico W firmware to get a driverless USB Wi-Fi adapter for Linux, macOS, and Windows.

items.title: Run statistics directly inside DuckDB
items.oneliner: DuckDB extension adds regression, bootstrap, confidence intervals, and table profiling directly in SQL.

items.title: Compare WebAssembly runtimes with real benchmarks
items.oneliner: Hands-on benchmark shows Wasmtime, Wasmer, WAVM, and WasmEdge performance on crypto workloads near native speed.

items.title: Edit TikZ diagrams visually
items.oneliner: Open-source WYSIWYG TikZ editor lets you drag nodes and export LaTeX without recompiling every change.

items.title: Build production RAG and agents
items.oneliner: Haystack gives you installable pipelines for RAG, agents, observability, and vendor-free production deployment.

items.title: Use the latest Datasette alpha
items.oneliner: Datasette 1.0a35 ships new features for publishing and exploring SQLite data through a browsable web interface.

items.title: Run image inpainting in the browser
items.oneliner: This walkthrough shows how to port the Moebius 0.2B inpainting model to browser-based WebAssembly.

items.title: Fix Mac cursor lag with script
items.oneliner: Tiny Mac utility records one screen pixel every 10 seconds to eliminate Neo cursor lag.

items.title: Stream YouTube audio inside Emacs
items.oneliner: Experimental Emacs package uses mpv and yt-dlp to turn YouTube channels into searchable radio streams.

items.title: Persist browser Python files with OPFS
items.oneliner: Practical notes on combining Pyodide with OPFS to build browser apps with persistent local Python storage.
